name: LazyMC - No Death XP Drop 1.21.1 Fabric
description: Players never drop XP orbs on death (independent of the keepInventory gamerule). Pairs with Total Levels Tracker: without this, dying and walking back to pick up your own dropped orbs would re-trigger addExperience() and inflate the lifetime total for XP that was never actually new - this closes that loophole at the source.
